case_title: JATIN PATEL VS. QT INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, JATIN AS TO DEFENDANT QT INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA QUICKNET TECHNOLOGIES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, JATIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QT INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA QUICKNET TECHNOLOGIES $16,742.88 PRINCIPAL, $95.80 INTEREST, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,139.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
